name: Slipstream
description: Deal 6([dex]) Pierce. Apply 2[poison]. Haste 15% for 6 seconds.

name: Vengeful Pyre
description: Exhaust. Exhaust the next card in order. Gain 12[rage]([str]). Apply 6[burn]([int]).

name: Crimson Cascade
description: Apply 1[bleed] to yourself. For 15 seconds: every time you kill an enemy with [bleed], apply 4[bleed]([spi]) to the nearest enemy.

name: Wrath Squall
description: When you reach 30[rage]: deal 40([str]) and apply 8[slow]([int]). Consume all [rage]. No more than once every 8 seconds.

name: Stonewrath
description: Gain 12[armor]([vit]). For 15 seconds: if you have less then 50%[HP], gain 6[rage].

name: Earthcleaver
description: Deal 14([str]). If [armor] is at least 15: deal 8 more Pierce.

name: Quarry Dance
description: Deal 10([dex]). If [armor] is at least 10: deal 8 more.

name: Wrath Brand
description: If you have [rage]: deal 12([str]) twice and apply 2[burn].

name: Necrotic Festering
description: Apply 3[bleed]([dex]) to yourself. Apply 1[poison]([int]) per [bleed] on yourself. Then deal 4([str]) Pierce per [bleed] consumed.

name: Quickstone
description: Gain 14[armor]([vit]). For 15 seconds: if you have less then 60%[HP], gain Haste 30% for 6 seconds.
